footer.statusDescription: Open to product work, freelance builds, and remote collaborations that need a strong engineering partner from concept to launch.
footer.summary: Full-stack product engineer building modern public experiences, admin tools, and backend workflows with a clean bilingual surface.
footer.builtWith: Built with modern web technologies and a product-first mindset.

hero.availability: Available for select freelance and product work
hero.headline: I build web products that feel
hero.subheadline: Full-stack product engineering for portfolio sites, admin dashboards, and backend workflows that need strong UX, clear architecture, and dependable delivery.
hero.surfaceValue: Public sites, dashboards, and internal tools
hero.cardDescription: From the first landing section to the admin workflows behind it, every layer is shaped to be usable, maintainable, and easy to extend.
hero.outcomesText: A clear product surface, stable CRUD flows, and a frontend that is easier to ship and easier to maintain.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: I turn ideas into useful digital products.
about.intro: The goal is not just shipping a pretty interface. The goal is shipping something clear, fast, and maintainable for the people who will use it every day.
about.strength1: Modern interfaces with strong information hierarchy
about.strength2: Backend workflows and CRUD systems that stay understandable
about.strength3: Performance and product polish that improve trust
about.editorComment: Supporting context, not the whole story.

projects.title: Selected
projects.subtitle: A clearer view of the products, systems, and admin surfaces I have built across public-facing and internal experiences.
projects.search: Search by title, category, or stack...
projects.noProjectsDescription: Try another keyword, reset the active filters, or add new featured work from the dashboard.

skills.title: Battle-Tested
skills.subtitle: A diverse range of languages, frameworks, and tools I've mastered over years of building enterprise-grade software. I focus on technologies that offer scalability, performance, and maintainability.

blog.title: Thoughts on
blog.subtitle: Insights, learnings, and deep dives into web technologies, architecture, and the craft of building great products.
blog.noArticlesDescription: Try another search term, switch categories, or publish a new article from the dashboard.

services.title: Services
services.description: I offer a comprehensive range of development services to bring your digital products to life.
services.frontendDesc: Building responsive, accessible, and highly interactive user interfaces using React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS.
services.backendDesc: Designing scalable APIs, robust database architectures, and secure server-side logic using Node.js.
services.mobileDesc: Creating cross-platform mobile experiences that feel native and perform beautifully on iOS and Android.
services.consultingDesc: Providing architectural guidance, code reviews, and performance optimization strategies for complex applications.

contact.title: Let's build something
contact.subtitle: If you have a project idea, need engineering support, or want a strong technical partner for an existing product, send the context and I will reply with the fastest useful next step.
contact.name: Name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me what you are building, what stage you are in, and what kind of help you need...
contact.signInPrefill: Sign in to prefill your details and keep the message thread tied to your account.
contact.successMsg: Thanks for the context. I will review it and reply as soon as possible.
contact.whatsappReqGuest: WhatsApp or another direct contact method is required if you are sending as a guest.
contact.availableDesc: I currently prioritize projects that need both product thinking and hands-on implementation across frontend, backend, and admin workflows.
contact.workingHoursQ: What response time should I expect?
contact.workingHoursA: Most messages get a first reply within 24 to 48 hours depending on scope and current workload.
contact.agenciesQ: Do you work with agencies and teams?
contact.agenciesA: Yes. I regularly collaborate with product teams, founders, and agencies as an implementation partner or technical lead.

validation.name: Name must be at least 2 characters.

validation.message: Message must be at least 10 characters.

testimonials.title: Selected Feedback
testimonials.subtitle: Short comments that reflect delivery quality and implementation depth.
testimonials.quote1: Clear communication, strong execution, and a much better product surface than where we started.
testimonials.quote2: The project moved from disconnected screens to a coherent product workflow with better performance and cleaner implementation.

cta.description: Whether you need a scalable SaaS dashboard, a high-performance e-commerce platform, or a modern mobile app, I'm here to help bring your vision to life.

featuredProjects.title: Projects worth opening first.
featuredProjects.subtitle: A curated slice of the products that best show structure, clarity, and delivery quality.
featuredProjects.name: name
featuredProjects.emptyDescription: Mark projects as featured from the dashboard to curate this section.

blogPost.connectDescription: If you need a custom product surface, admin workflow, or a reliable engineering partner, let's talk.

ctaSection.title: Bring the product context, not just the wish list.
ctaSection.description: The fastest collaborations start with a clear brief. Share the goal, the constraints, and the current state of the product, and I will help shape the right next move.
ctaSection.responseDescription: Useful first replies focus on scope clarity, technical constraints, and whether the work fits the current roadmap.
ctaSection.focusDescription: Strong fit for portfolio sites, dashboards, internal tools, CRUD-heavy apps, and bilingual experiences.

showcase.title: More than a polished landing page.
showcase.subtitle: This workspace combines a public portfolio, a private admin dashboard, Firestore-backed CRUD, and bilingual presentation so the product feels complete, not decorative.
showcase.publicDescription: Project discovery, detail pages, blog content, and a contact flow designed for real conversations.
showcase.adminDescription: One place to manage projects, skills, blog posts, messages, and core profile settings.
showcase.crudDescription: Collections wired for real content updates instead of static demo-only sections.
showcase.i18nDescription: English and Arabic copy paths with RTL support across the public experience.

projectDetail.notFoundDescription: The requested project is not available in the current workspace data.
projectDetail.caseStudyFallback: This project is published and linked, but its structured case-study summary has not been filled in yet from the dashboard.
projectDetail.noTech: No technologies were listed for this project yet.
